name: The (un)Holy Monastery - A Twisted Clergy (XTRA Horny Edition)
description:
"You can stay for as long as you need to. In fact, we want you to stay."

During a walk through a forest as part of your vacation, you lost your footing and stumbled down a hill, knocking your head and losing consciousness. By the time you came by, you find a group of nuns stood over you, having taken care of you and offering you an unlimited amount of time for recovery in their remote monastery...

Art by Mitsudoue.
The Less Horny version can be found right here.

-Additional Image-

Even though the monastery is out of reach for receiving the internet, a few of the sisters still record and take pictures on their smartphones, and smuggle in condoms for some lucky visitors.

Her words were eager, as they ventured towards one of the storage rooms of this exclusively-female monastery.
